baseline.notes: Run 49 Rush baseline (field_crop only): F1 0.417, P 0.417, R 0.417, TP 65, FP 91. Run 52 sporting_ac with field_crop+ball_crop dual-view blew past Run 50 baseline: F1 0.210 -> 0.367 (+0.157), TP 17 -> 33, precision INCREASED 0.515 -> 0.647. The throw_in class carried almost the whole win (+16 TP) because the ball zoom supplies the ball-in-hands pose detail the prompt was already looking for but couldn't resolve at wide 1280x540 resolution. Run 53 checks whether the same dual-view config also holds (or improves) Rush. If Rush holds, ship ball_crop as default.

targets.notes: Rush F1 must hold >=0.417. Rush ball detection rate should be higher than sporting_ac's 16.7% (field fills the frame, ball is more prominent). If ball_zoom provides similar TP gain on Rush, F1 could jump to 0.45+. If ball_zoom confuses Rush's well-tuned baseline (e.g. misreads on specific types), we'll see which types regress and decide.

ball_crop_enabled.reason: Dual-view (wide field_crop + zoom ball_crop) — same config that drove Run 52 sporting_ac F1 0.210 -> 0.367. Commit 20f862f / state commit b86bdd1. Field_crop already shipped as default in Run 49.

notes: Run #53: Rush regression check for ball_crop dual-view. Worker running on commit 20f862f+ with FIELD_CROP_ENABLED=true and BALL_CROP_ENABLED=true. No new code since Run 52. Pre-flight pending.
